expectations.text: c-dimensions-not-e: Assessment uses C1-C4 (not E1-E4) for controllability
expectations.evidence: The report uses 'E1-E4' for controllability (line 26: 'Controllability (E1-E4) — Score: 8/12 — Level 2'). The assessment should use C1-C4 labeling per the scaffold's naming convention, not E1-E4.

expectations.text: o-dimensions-unchanged: Assessment uses O1-O4 for observability
expectations.evidence: The report correctly uses O1-O4 for observability (line 54: 'Observability (O1-O4) — Score: 12/12 — Level 3'). The labeling is consistent with the scaffold.

expectations.text: agent-autonomy-focus: Assessment specifically addresses agent self-debug capability
expectations.evidence: The prompt asked specifically: 'can an agent self-debug a runtime error without human help?' The report never directly addresses self-debugging. It discusses test infrastructure (V1), CI pipelines (V3), and agent autonomy broadly, but does not analyze whether the scaffolding enables an agent to diagnose and fix its own runtime errors without human intervention. No section explicitly answers the self-debug question.

expectations.text: behavioral-gap-reasoning: Each gap explains WHY it matters for agent autonomy, not just what is missing
expectations.evidence: Section 6 (Priority Gaps) consistently includes an 'Impact:' explanation for each gap, linking the missing element to consequences for agent autonomy. Examples: Gap #1 (no tests) → 'Agent cannot verify correctness of changes automatically'; Gap #4 (lint-check.sh missing) → 'agent may not know Golden Principles checks are not running'; Gap #5 (bash compatibility) → scripts 'fail on macOS bash and zsh environments.' All gaps include WHY-level reasoning.

expectations.text: injection-point-list: Assessment lists specific files with idioms used in the codebase
expectations.evidence: GP-003 lists 6 specific files: src/ink/ink.tsx, src/ink/components/App.tsx, src/main.tsx, src/tasks/RemoteAgentTask/RemoteAgentTask.tsx, src/components/DesktopUpsell/DesktopUpsellStartup.tsx, src/commands/ultraplan.tsx. GP-008 lists specific files including src/commands/terminalSetup/terminalSetup.tsx, src/commands/thinkback/thinkback.tsx, src/services/mcp/MCPConnectionManager.tsx. The report names concrete source files with idiomatic violations.
